name: tomxtractor-49ja
description: TomXtractor 49ja v1.0.12 - Professional Global Email Extraction & Verified Mailing Tool

scripts.dev: set ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=&& concurrently "npm run dev:renderer" "npm run dev:main"
scripts.dev:main: wait-on http://localhost:5173 && tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && set ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=&& electron .
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:main
scripts.build:admin: npm run build:admin:renderer && npm run build:admin:main
scripts.package: npm run build && npx electron-builder --win --config builder.json
scripts.package:admin: npm run build:admin && npx electron-builder --win --config admin-builder.json
